description:
Flip the runtime default for `workerExecution.mode` from `"worktree"` to `"current-branch"` after the system is proven through pre-flip tests and scripted e2e smoke coverage.

## What to implement

In `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/config.ts`:
- Change the default value of `workerExecution.mode` from `"worktree"` to `"current-branch"`.

## Why this happens after the e2e script work

The scripts from `sbdpi-qmd.5.6` should exist before the default flip. Before this task, they run current-branch scenarios using explicit config/env overrides. After this task, the final regression task (`sbdpi-qmd.5.5`) reruns the same e2e flows without an override to prove the default really changed.

This avoids flipping the product default before we have deterministic operator-level smoke coverage.

## Prerequisites (must ALL be true before this change)

- Phase 1: types, config, registry normalization implemented.
- Phase 2: current-branch launch works.
- Phase 3: current-branch verification works.
- Phase 4: scope-completion validation/review works.
- Phase 5 crash recovery works.
- UI shows execution mode correctly enough that operators can distinguish current-branch and worktree workers.
- Legacy worktree unit/regression tests still pass.
- The deterministic e2e scripts from `sbdpi-qmd.5.6` exist and pass in explicit `workerExecution.mode=current-branch` mode.

## Design Rules

- This is the LAST behavior change before the final regression gate, not an early migration step.
- `worktree` MUST remain accessible via config file (`workerExecution.mode: "worktree"`).
- `worktree` MUST remain accessible via env (`PI_BEADWORK_WORKER_EXECUTION_MODE=worktree`).
- Do NOT remove any worktree code paths.
- Do NOT weaken e2e scenarios to make the flip pass; fix the product behavior instead.
- Verify the change by running focused config/default tests here; the full post-flip e2e run belongs to `sbdpi-qmd.5.5`.

## Tests

- Default config resolves to `"current-branch"` without any override.
- Explicit `"worktree"` config overrides the default.
- Env var override still works in both directions.
- Existing tests that assumed implicit worktree mode are updated to use explicit worktree config where needed.
- Focused config and launch tests pass with the new default.

## Definition of Done

- Default is `"current-branch"`.
- `worktree` mode preserved via explicit config/env.
- Tests that require worktree mode are explicit and still pass.
- Pre-flip e2e scripts remain available for the final post-flip regression run.
- lint/test/typecheck pass clean.
title: Flip workerExecution.mode default to current-branch
